name: whisperkey
description: Offline hold-to-talk voice dictation for macOS

scripts.verify: node scripts/verify-v1.js && node scripts/test-recorder.js && node scripts/test-asr-args.js && node scripts/test-asr-framework.js && node scripts/test-hotkey-paths.js && node scripts/test-hotkey-config.js && node scripts/test-hotkey-settings-ui.js && node scripts/test-native-paste.js && node scripts/test-injector-native.js && node scripts/test-after-pack.js && node scripts/test-install-location.js && node scripts/test-diagnostics.js && node scripts/test-diagnostic-actions.js && node scripts/test-startup-flow.js && node scripts/test-overlay-layout.js

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: WhisperKey records your voice locally to transcribe dictation.
extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: WhisperKey can send a paste command to the current app after local transcription.
